hotels.name: Holiday Inn Bogota Airport by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
Featuring a restaurant and a fitness centre, Holiday Inn Bogota Airport offers rooms with free Wi-Fi and air conditioning in Bogota. Airport shuttles are provided. Corferias Convention centre is a 5-minute drive away.

Fully carpeted, rooms at Holiday Inn Bogota are fitted with satellite TV and minibars. Some of them have separate seating areas.

Breakfast is served daily. International dishes can be ordered at the propertyâ€™s restaurant. The lively Zona T with its bars and restaurants is 12 km away.

Free airport shuttles are provided and are subject to reservation and availability. Holiday Inn Bogota Airport is a 10-minute drive from El Dorado Airport and 2.3 km from Gran Estacion commerical area.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Camelia by Masaya Collection in BogotÃ¡ offers family rooms with private bathrooms, free WiFi, and modern amenities. Each room includes a work desk, minibar, TV, and wardrobe.
Dining Experience: The modern restaurant serves local cuisine for lunch and dinner. Guests can enjoy a buffet breakfast each morning.
Convenient Facilities: The hotel provides free WiFi in public areas, a paid airport shuttle service, room service, and a terrace with a view of a landmark.
Prime Location: Located 13 km from El Dorado International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Luis Angel Arango Library (5-minute walk), Bolivar Square (less than 1 km), and Church of Our Lady of Candelaria (400 metres).
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.
